plugins.name: Daily Notes
plugins.description: Create and navigate daily journal notes

plugins.name: Canvas
plugins.description: Visual canvas with cards, links, and spatial notes

plugins.name: Backlinks
plugins.description: View and navigate backlinks between notes

plugins.name: Note Composer
plugins.description: Split, merge, and extract content between notes

plugins.name: Workspace
plugins.description: Native workspace operations: PDF export, tab/pane management, file paths

plugins.name: Templates
plugins.description: Insert predefined note templates

plugins.name: Search
plugins.description: Full-text search across the vault

plugins.name: Quick Switcher
plugins.description: Quickly navigate to any note by name

plugins.name: Bookmarks
plugins.description: Bookmark and organize favorite notes

plugins.name: Outline
plugins.description: View heading structure of the current note

plugins.name: Tags
plugins.description: Browse all tags used in the vault

plugins.name: Random Note
plugins.description: Open a random note from the vault

plugins.name: App
plugins.description: Core app operations: navigation, delete, reload, sidebars

plugins.name: Editor
plugins.description: Editor operations: formatting, headings, inserts, folding, view mode

plugins.name: File Explorer
plugins.description: File explorer: create, move, and reveal files

plugins.name: Markdown
plugins.description: Toggle between editing and reading view

plugins.name: Graph View
plugins.description: Visualize note connections as a graph

plugins.name: Slides
plugins.description: Present notes as slideshows using --- separators

plugins.name: Open with Default App
plugins.description: Open files in the system default app or file manager

plugins.name: Theme
plugins.description: Switch between light and dark mode or change themes

plugins.name: Window
plugins.description: Window controls: zoom and always-on-top

plugins.name: Dataview
plugins.description: Complex data views for the data-obsessed.

plugins.name: Excalidraw
plugins.description: Sketch Your Mind. Edit and view Excalidraw drawings. Enter the world of 4D Visual PKM.

plugins.name: Git
plugins.description: Integrate Git version control with automatic backup and other advanced features.

plugins.name: Kanban
plugins.description: Create markdown-backed Kanban boards in Obsidian.

plugins.name: Style Settings
plugins.description: Offers controls for adjusting theme, plugin, and snippet CSS variables.

plugins.name: Tasks
plugins.description: Track tasks across your vault. Supports due dates, recurring tasks, done dates, sub-set of checklist items, and filtering.

plugins.name: QuickAdd
plugins.description: Quickly add new pages or content to your vault.

plugins.name: Recent Files
plugins.description: List files by most recently opened.

plugins.name: Threaded Comments
plugins.description: Notion-style inline comments with highlights, speech bubbles, and threaded replies.

plugins.name: Vault Operator
plugins.description: Agentic AI operating layer for your vault. Discovers and uses installed plugins, maintains persistent unified memory, and adapts to your workflows, skills and tools with full safety controls.
